chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.64 of 2020 Textile Institute of Pakistan and another Versus Mr. Gauhar Ajmal and another DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection/reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.581/2020 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.05.2024 None present for appellant. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Appellants’ counsel was called absent on the last date of hearing and so also today. There is no intimation either. The appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
